title: Combobox
description: A combobox combines text entry with a selectable list of suggestions.
whenToUse: Use when users can search or type to narrow a large option set, especially when free text and selection share the same field.
whenNotToUse: For a closed set of simple options, use Dropdown. For 2-4 visible options, use Radio.
acceptanceCriteria: Figma component set exists and exposes variant properties
Examples and Code tabs are generated from inspected Figma structure
Component CSS uses UDS tokens only
Spec JSON reaches required minimum plus props/states/accessibility
knownIssues: Figma 0.3 has a public placeholder page but no inspectable component set yet; examples, CSS implementation, playground, and Demo Builder entry are intentionally deferred until the Figma component set exists.
